tasks.name: Preprocess EmoV-DB: train/val/test split (80/10/10), extract mel-spectrogram, F0, energy, duration features
Preprocess IEMOCAP: 5-fold leave-one-speaker-out splits, feature extraction
Curate 30-utterance audiobook evaluation set from LibriVox (narrator stance variation)
Train FastSpeech2 one-hot baseline: 6-class emotion conditioning via espnet2 TTS module
Train β-VAE β=1 (standard VAE anchor, minimal disentanglement pressure, z_dim=32)
Train β-VAE β=2 (moderate disentanglement, warm-up schedule 0→2 over 10k steps)
Train β-VAE β=4 (high disentanglement, warm-up schedule 0→4 over 10k steps)
Train β-VAE β=8 (maximum disentanglement, warm-up schedule 0→8 over 10k steps)
Ablation: β-VAE β=0 (pure reconstruction autoencoder, no KL pressure, no controllability)
Train BERT-conditioned prosody: frozen bert-base-uncased [CLS] → 768→64 projection → FastSpeech2 variance adaptor
Ablation: BERT conditioning without trainable projection (raw 768-dim → variance adaptor)
Train ASVspoof ECAPA-TDNN linear MOS probe: 192-dim embeddings → 1 MOS score on EmoV-DB (20 epochs, lr=0.001)
Evaluate β-VAE sweep (H1): UTMOS, MIG score, emotion classification accuracy, Spearman ρ(β, naturalness)
Evaluate BERT vs one-hot (H2): audiobook appropriateness MOS, ecological validity on 30-utterance set, UTMOS delta
Evaluate ASVspoof oracle (H3): Spearman ρ and Kendall τ between oracle scores and MOS ranking across all 5 TTS systems
Aggregate all metrics: compute H1 Spearman ρ(β, MOS), H2 MOS delta table, H3 Kendall τ method ranking

total_gpu_budget.note: Seed multiplication: each training task × 5 seeds. β warm-up required for β>1 to mitigate training instability risk. Vocoder held constant across all TTS systems during oracle evaluation.
